title: sambucus williamsii var. miquelii
intro: Sambucus williamsii var. miquelii, also known as the Dwarf Elder or Chinese Red Elder, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia. It belongs to the Sambucus genus, which is a group of flowering plants known for their medicinal properties. The plant's berries, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for immune system support, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Sambucus williamsii var. miquelii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to boost the immune system and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms.
